addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 review found deterministic run adapter/scenario failures bypassed TASK-005 failed-step publication and Swift run options were silently ignored.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Adapter and non-adapter execution failures now publish failed executions through WorkflowPublicationRequest(adapterFailure:) before throwing. maxLoopIterations now bounds deterministic runs, timeoutMs/defaultTimeoutMs propagate to adapter deadlines, and unsupported artifactRoot/sessionStore/maxConcurrency options return CLI usage errors with focused Swift regressions. Full Xcode Swift 6.3.2 swift test passed 163 tests; Swift validate/inspect/run smokes, unsupported run-option usage smoke, Bun typecheck/lint, and TypeScript fallback validation passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 review found validate/inspect accepted endpoint/from-registry without rejecting unsupported remote resolution, and workflow run --output json failures returned empty stdout.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Validate and inspect now reject endpoint/from-registry with CLIUsageError usage behavior. workflow run --output json now returns a parseable WorkflowRunFailureResult envelope for usage, load, validation, and execution failures. Added parser, usage-exit, and invalid-variables JSON failure regressions. Xcode Swift 6.3.2 focused RielaCLITests passed 10 tests; full swift test passed 166 tests; Swift success/failure smokes, Bun typecheck/lint, and TypeScript fallback validation passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 review found deterministic run ignored NodeOutputContract.maxValidationAttempts, so scenario response sequences could not advance after output-contract rejection.
addressedFeedback.resolution: DeterministicWorkflowRunner now retries adapter execution and TASK-005 publication for output validation rejection up to maxValidationAttempts, passes the real attempt number into WorkflowPublicationRequest, and preserves no downstream messages for rejected attempts. Added invalid-then-valid scenario sequence regression. Focused RielaCLITests passed 11 tests; full swift test passed 167 tests; Swift validate/inspect/run smokes, Bun typecheck/lint, and TypeScript fallback validation passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 adversarial review found deterministic run published multiple direct transition messages but executed only the first, allowing misleading completion with unexecuted downstream work.
addressedFeedback.resolution: The TASK-007 sequential deterministic runner now fails closed before accepted publication when more than one direct transition is publishable from one adapter output, records the failed execution through TASK-005 publication, and appends no downstream messages. Added a two-transition regression. Focused DeterministicWorkflowRunnerTests passed 8 tests; RielaCLITests passed 11 tests; full swift test passed 168 tests; Swift validate/inspect/run smokes, Bun typecheck/lint, and TypeScript fallback validation passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 review found multiple-transition fail-closed logic checked AdapterExecutionOutput.when before output-contract envelope normalization, so envelope when labels could still append multiple direct messages while the sequential runner advanced only to the first.
addressedFeedback.resolution: DeterministicWorkflowRunner now normalizes adapter output to RuntimeOutputCandidate before counting publishable transitions and fails closed using the same when map used by runtime publication. Added a regression where adapterOutput.when disables labeled transitions but the output-contract envelope enables two labels. Focused DeterministicWorkflowRunnerTests passed 9 tests; full swift test passed 169 tests; git diff --check and jq empty impl-plans/PROGRESS.json passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 review found workflow validate --output json did not preserve machine-readable JSON stdout for resolver load errors, invalid workflow diagnostics, malformed node-patch JSON, or preflight errors.
addressedFeedback.resolution: WorkflowValidateCommand now emits WorkflowValidationFailureResult JSON envelopes for validate failures when JSON output is selected, including invalid workflow diagnostics. Added regressions for missing workflow, invalid workflow diagnostics, and malformed node-patch JSON. Focused RielaCLITests passed 14 tests; full swift test passed 172 tests; missing-workflow JSON smoke parsed with jq; git diff --check and jq empty impl-plans/PROGRESS.json passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 adversarial review found workflow inspect --output json still returned empty stdout with plain stderr on resolver or validation failure, unlike validate/run JSON failure envelopes.
addressedFeedback.resolution: WorkflowInspectCommand now emits WorkflowInspectionFailureResult JSON envelopes for inspect failures when JSON output is selected, including invalid workflow diagnostics. Added regressions for missing workflow and invalid workflow diagnostics. Focused RielaCLITests passed 16 tests; full swift test passed 174 tests; missing-workflow inspect JSON smoke parsed with jq; git diff --check and jq empty impl-plans/PROGRESS.json passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 adversarial review found RielaCLIApplication caught parser CLIUsageError before command renderers could honor --output json, leaving parser-stage failures as stderr-only diagnostics.
addressedFeedback.resolution: RielaCLIApplication now renders parser-stage usage failures as WorkflowValidationFailureResult, WorkflowInspectionFailureResult, or WorkflowRunFailureResult JSON envelopes when workflow raw arguments include --output json. Added focused Swift CLI regressions for run endpoint rejection, validate unknown option, and inspect missing option value parser failures. Focused RielaCLITests passed 19 tests; full swift test passed 177 tests; built-executable parser JSON smokes passed with empty stderr; git diff --check and jq empty impl-plans/PROGRESS.json passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 review found Swift inspect did not preserve callable stepId, role, input, and output contracts from node payloads.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Added NodeInputContract decoding, included input on AgentNodePayload, and changed WorkflowInspectionSummary.callable to derive manager/entry stepId, role, input, and output contracts without requiring jsonSchema. Added project workflow callable contract regression and jq smoke. Focused RielaCLITests passed 20 tests; full swift test passed 178 tests; git diff --check and jq empty impl-plans/PROGRESS.json passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Step 7 adversarial review found scoped project/user workflow names could traverse outside .riela/workflows and addon-only executable preflight falsely reported valid=true.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Added scoped workflow name validation, standardized resolver candidate containment checks, addon-only executable preflight invalidation, and focused Swift CLI regressions for traversal/slash names plus addon-only validate/run parity. Focused RielaCLITests passed 22 tests; full swift test passed 180 tests; built-executable traversal/addon smokes passed with parseable JSON and empty stderr; git diff --check and jq empty impl-plans/PROGRESS.json passed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Scoped project/user workflow containment used standardized paths without resolving symlinks, so a safe-name symlink under .riela/workflows could resolve outside the scoped workflow root.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Resolved root and candidate directories with resolvingSymlinksInPath before containment and before reading workflow.json/node files, rejected escaped resolved candidates, and added validate/inspect/run symlink escape regressions.

addressedFeedback.finding: Symlinked workflow.json and symlinked node payload files under a safe scoped workflow directory could resolve outside the scoped project/user workflow root and still be loaded.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Resolved workflow.json and nodeFile payload URLs through symlinks before reading, containment-checked resolved file targets for project/user scopes, and added validate/inspect/run JSON failure regressions for both symlinked file escape cases.

addressedFeedback.finding: Swift transition publication and deterministic run safety used exact when[label] lookup instead of TypeScript branch expression semantics for labels like !(flag) and compound boolean expressions.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Implemented shared branch expression evaluation and wired it into publication and deterministic runner fail-closed checks. Added tests for negated branch publication, expression precedence, payload fallback, and multiple expression transitions failing closed.

addressedFeedback.finding: Scenario response sequencing used per-step call count instead of TypeScript executionIndex/maxValidationAttempts/attempt sequence math, causing repeated steps with unused validation retry slots to select the wrong mock response.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Added adapter executionIndex and output attempt context, populated them from DeterministicWorkflowRunner, updated ScenarioNodeAdapter to use the TypeScript sequence formula, and added a repeated-step regression that skips the unused retry slot.

codexAgentReference: Preferred ../../codex-agent root unavailable; adjacent ../codex-agent/dist/sdk/mock-session-runner.d.ts is reference-only for deterministic synthetic sessions, recorded calls, injected options, explicit completion, and no live Codex process. Riela TypeScript references remain packages/riela/src/cli/argument-parser.ts, workflow-command-handler.ts, workflow-run-command.ts, workflow/scenario-adapter.ts, workflow/engine/workflow-runner.ts, and workflow/engine/step-result-finalization.ts.
issueReference: Implement Swift CLI parity commands for workflow validate inspect and deterministic mock run; workflowInput.requestedBehavior TASK-007; no matching GitHub issue URL or number supplied
parallelizableTasks: TASK-001 and TASK-005 may run in parallel because CLI parser/test-target files and Core/Adapter deterministic runner files are disjoint.
TASK-003 and TASK-004 may run in parallel only after TASK-002 is accepted and write scopes remain validate-command versus inspect-command/rendering files.
residualRisks: Default swift lookup still requires DEVELOPER_DIR and SDKROOT override because xcode-select can point at a Nix Apple SDK path.
Swift TASK-007 is deterministic local CLI parity only; release cutover, remote endpoint execution, registry-backed run mutation, live gateways, and live agent credentials remain out of scope.
Preferred ../../codex-agent root remains unavailable; adjacent ../codex-agent is reference-only and not an implementation source.
CLI implementation must preserve runtime-owned communication id allocation and output publication from TASK-005.
